serviceDescription.aws: Amazon GameLift is a dedicated game server hosting solution that deploys, operates, and scales cloud servers for multiplayer games. Whether you’re looking for a fully managed solution, or just the feature you need, GameLift leverages the power of AWS to deliver the best latency possible, low player wait times, and maximum cost savings.
serviceDescription.aws-cn: Amazon GameLift is a dedicated game server hosting solution that deploys, operates, and scales cloud servers for multiplayer games. Whether you’re looking for a fully managed solution, or just the feature you need, GameLift leverages the power of Amazon Web Services to deliver the best latency possible, low player wait times, and maximum cost savings.

templates.title: Estimate GameLift hosting (Instance + Data Transfer Out)
templates.description: Choose this option to estimate hosting your games on GameLift servers. GameLift offers both On-Demand and Spot instances. With Spot instances, you get the same high-performance hardware as with On-Demand, at a savings of up to 70% compared with existing on-premises hosting. Game hosting with GameLift includes FlexMatch. Charges for GameLift hosting are based on instance types, instance usage, and data transfers.

helpText.aws: Amazon GameLift offers both On-Demand and Spot instances. With Spot instances you get the same high-performance hardware as On-Demand instances at savings up to 70% compared to existing on-premises deployments.
helpText.aws-cn: Amazon GameLift offers both On-Demand and Spot instances. With Spot instances you get the same high-performance hardware as On-Demand instances at savings up to 70% compared to existing on-premises deployments.

components.label: info alert
components.content: Note: we offer pricing discounts for large scale games, please contact us if your game costs are over $80K per month or just need help estimating your costs.

components.label: Peak concurrent players (peak CCU)
components.placeholder: Enter the number of Peak Concurrent Players (peak CCU) in the region
components.description: Enter the peak number of concurrent players on game servers that are hosted in the selected region.

components.label: Game sessions per instance
components.placeholder: Enter the number of game sessions per instance
components.description: Enter the number of game sessions that are hosted on each instance. This value is set in a fleet's runtime configuration.

components.label: Players per game session
components.placeholder: Enter the number of players per game session
components.description: Enter the number of players per game session.

components.label: Instance idle buffer %
components.description: Enter the amount of buffer capacity needed, which determines the number of idle instances that are maintained to handle sudden spikes in player demand. For example, a fleet with 100 active instances supporting players will maintain 10 idle instances.

description.aws: Enter a target percentage for Spot usage across a fleet. Spot instances offer customers access to spare AWS computing capacity at savings. Recommended Spot instance percentage is between 50% to 85%.
description.aws-cn: Enter a target percentage for Spot usage across a fleet. Spot instances offer customers access to spare Amazon Web Services computing capacity at savings. Recommended Spot instance percentage is between 50% to 85%.

row.label: Instance type
row.description: This defaults to the most commonly used instance type for gaming workload.

row.label: Operating system
row.description: Enter the operating system for instances in the selected region.

components.text: See On-Demand and Spot instance prices in calculations below. Spot instance price fluctuates. Typical Spot instance cost is 30% of On-Demand on Linux and 65% of On-Demand on Windows.

operands.constantUnitLabel: concurrent players per hour as a percentage of peak CCU

components.outputUnitLabel: (Average concurrent players per hour. Note: Average player per hour over a 24-hour period is estimated to be 30% of peak daily CCU.)
(Total number of player hours per month)

operands.variableLabel: (Total number of player hours per month)

operands.constantUnitLabel: estimated Spot cost as a percentage of On-Demand

components.label: Total monthly cost for Spot instances

components.outputUnitLabel: [currency] (Total monthly cost for all GameLift instances)

exists.meteredUnit: DataTransfer External Outbound Greater than 150 TB

helpText.aws: You are charged data transfer fees for traffic between your game servers and your game clients. Inbound data transfer is free. For outbound data transfer rates to other AWS services and regions, visit Data Transfer Rates.
helpText.aws-cn: You are charged data transfer fees for traffic between your game servers and your game clients. Inbound data transfer is free. For outbound data transfer rates to other Amazon Web Services and regions, visit Data Transfer Rates.

components.label: info alert
components.content: Effective December 1, 2021, the first 100 gigabytes per month of data transfer out to the internet from all AWS Regions will be free (excludes China and GovCoud). We are working to update the calculator to reflect this expanded offering. In the meantime, please incorporate this change into your pricing calculator inputs below.
